title: [MSFT] Systolic Arrays -- high level model
body:
CIRCT model and basic lowering for a row/column broadcast systolic array. Intended to enable automated placement and pipelining. Will flesh this out in subsequent patches.

Result:
```verilog
module SAExample1(      // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:31:1
  input                  clk,
  output [1:0][2:0][7:0] out);

  wire [7:0] _pe_sum;   // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
  wire [7:0] _pe_sum_0; // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
  wire [7:0] _pe_sum_1; // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
  wire [7:0] _pe_sum_2; // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
  wire [7:0] _pe_sum_3; // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
  wire [7:0] _pe_sum_4; // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14

  PE pe (       // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
    .clk (clk),
    .a   (8'h1),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:33:11
    .b   (8'h2),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:34:11
    .sum (_pe_sum_4)
  );
  PE pe_5 (     // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
    .clk (clk),
    .a   (8'h1),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:33:11
    .b   (8'h1),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:33:11
    .sum (_pe_sum_3)
  );
  PE pe_6 (     // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
    .clk (clk),
    .a   (8'h1),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:33:11
    .b   (8'h0),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:32:11
    .sum (_pe_sum_2)
  );
  PE pe_7 (     // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
    .clk (clk),
    .a   (8'h0),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:32:11
    .b   (8'h2),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:34:11
    .sum (_pe_sum_1)
  );
  PE pe_8 (     // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
    .clk (clk),
    .a   (8'h0),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:32:11
    .b   (8'h1),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:33:11
    .sum (_pe_sum_0)
  );
  PE pe_9 (     // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:43:14
    .clk (clk),
    .a   (8'h0),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:32:11
    .b   (8'h0),        // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:32:11
    .sum (_pe_sum)
  );
  assign out = {{{{_pe_sum}, {_pe_sum_0}, {_pe_sum_1}}}, {{{_pe_sum_2}, {_pe_sum_3}, {_pe_sum_4}}}};    // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:39:13, :43:14, :46:3
endmodule

module PE(      // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:49:1
  input        clk,
  input  [7:0] a, b,
  output [7:0] sum);

  reg [7:0] sumDelay1;  // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:51:16

  always_ff @(posedge clk)      // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:51:16
    sumDelay1 <= a + b; // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:50:10, :51:16
  assign sum = sumDelay1;       // test/Dialect/MSFT/constructs.mlir:51:16, :52:3
endmodule
```
